ThanksNET.ConsoleApp 1.0.0
Tomáš Bouda

  -s, --solutiondir    Required. Sets solution directory from which all

  -t, --githubtoken    Required. Sets github personal token. It will be used to

  --help               Display this help screen.

  --version            Display version information.
